input.subject: MCP governance alert: {{ event()["event.name"] | default("(no event)") }}

eventTrigger.filterQuery: event.kind == "DAVIS_PROBLEM" AND event.status == "ACTIVE" AND (event.status_transition == "CREATED" OR event.status_transition == "UPDATED" OR event.status_transition == "REOPENED") AND dt.analysis.ready == true AND (event.category == "CUSTOM") AND (matchesPhrase(dt.alert_group, "mcp-governance"))
